expectations.evidence: No structured intake brief. Goes directly to debugging suggestions.
Does not classify as hotfix or any work type. Treats it as generic debugging.
Implicitly goes to implementation/debugging (though without explicit phase awareness).
No workflow selection. No concept of hotfix vs normal process.
Opens with 'This sounds urgent! Let's debug this right away.'
Recommends rollback: 'I'd recommend rolling back first to stop the bleeding.'
Asks for technical info (logs, diff) but does not ask for approval of an approach.
